scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,web -c magenta,cyan,yellow "npm run dev --workspace @snowbattle/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @snowbattle/server" "npm run dev --workspace @snowbattle/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @snowbattle/shared && npm run build --workspace @snowbattle/server && npm run build --workspace @snowbattle/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @snowbattle/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @snowbattle/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @snowbattle/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @snowbattle/shared && npm run lint --workspace @snowbattle/server && npm run lint --workspace @snowbattle/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @snowbattle/shared && npm run test --workspace @snowbattle/server && npm run test --workspace @snowbattle/web
